subject: Your agency is leaving 25% of retainer revenue on the table
body:
Hi [Name],

Most agencies under-bill by 20–30% — not because they undercharge, but because time tracking is inconsistent and scope creep goes undocumented.

Checked your pricing page: you're running project-based and retainer models. That mix is especially vulnerable to silent revenue leakage.

[Product] tracks scope automatically and surfaces upsell moments before clients even ask. Agencies using it recover an average of $4,200/month in previously unbilled work.

Want to see what that looks like for your revenue mix?
why_it_works: data-driven — specific revenue loss framing + observation + concrete dollar amount recovery
